title: Only emit waivers for emitted warnings in waiver output

features.name: verilator lint_off directive with rule file and match
features.description: Code should include a verilator lint_off directive with UNUSEDSIGNAL rule specifying file and match pattern for signal suppression
features.snippet: // verilator lint_off -rule UNUSEDSIGNAL -file "*src/crush_0.0.1/rtl/cpu/registers.v" -match "Signal is not used: 'x0'"
